name: Vercel
description: Monitor Vercel deployments and project configuration for cloud compliance

config.setupInstructions:
Connect your Vercel account so Comp AI can monitor deployments and project health.

Step 1 — Create a Vercel API token
1. Go to https://vercel.com/account/tokens
2. Click "Create Token"
3. Give it a name like "Comp AI"
4. Set "Scope" to your team (or your personal account)
5. **IMPORTANT — set "Expiration" to "No Expiration"** so you never have to reconnect
6. Click Create and copy the token immediately (you can't view it again)

Step 2 — Paste the token below

Note: As long as you keep "No Expiration" and don't delete the token in Vercel, this connection is permanent. If you ever rotate or delete the token in Vercel, you'll need to paste a new one here.

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Vercel projects have active production deployments

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting Review
checks.description: Verify Vercel monitoring is capturing deployment failures and recent activity
